arguments of the socialists to cast


his ballot in favor of their candi
dates.


Ever since the close of the last


campaign the socialist party has
maintained an active and agrees
i've agitation which, according to
them, has been so successful that
they expect not only to hold their
former vote, but to have it greatly
increased.


Whether the socialist philosophy
is right or wrong, it is certain that
the socialist party on the Pacific
coast has won a position of respect
and power in the last few years
which, in the light of actual &C
and obstacles over
come, is remarkable, to say the
least.


A few years ago when mention
was made of socialism the ordin-
airy citizen had a vision of long
haired fanatics running amuck
with dynamite bombs. The pub
lie street corner has ever been TIE
most favored rostrum of the soci-
list agitator. and he has had
long, hard fight to secure the right
to use the public streets At one
time the socialists of San Francis
co secured an injunction restrain
ing the police from interrupting
their meetings on the street. The
Los Angeles city council not long
ago passed an ordinance prohibit
ing any one from speaking on the
streets. Quite recently the social
